dialogue.speaker: wren
dialogue.line: I'm sorry -- someone will come for you. We can't let them reach the wreck first.

dialogue.speaker: tam
dialogue.line: Straight to the hatch, then. Quick and quiet, like you like it.

_note: R3b-2 BR-SLICE option 'hurry' target. Sets SLICE_HURRIED_WRECK (via the branch option). Converges on SLICE-WRECK.
